items.title: Asia FX: Softer USD offset by high Oil – OCBC
items.summary: OCBC’s Sim Moh Siong and Christopher Wong expect Asian FX to trade with a better tone after softer United States (US) core Consumer Price Index (CPI) reduced near-term Fed hike expectations and pressured USD.
